# Carotenoid energy dissipation

## Short Teaching Summary
Carotenoid energy dissipation: When a leaf is exposed to full sun, carotenoids absorb excess energy and safely dissipate that energy as heat. Map connection: this idea links by example_of to nearby concepts. Pause point: say the main idea in one short phrase before moving on.
